entry.title: Books Request
entry.summary: In order to keep the application in the Aswaja corridor, the application may only contain books that have been verified by the developer. To make…
entry.content: In order to keep the application in the Aswaja corridor, the application may only contain books that have been verified by the developer. To make a book request, you can contact via email dev.kbcdrn@gmail.com with the subject "Book Request".

entry.title: Kitab
entry.summary: Kitab yang dapat diunduh di Aplikasi disimpan di server GitHub-Kitab Repo. Data Kitab diunggah ke GitHub-Releases. Semua ID Kitab telah diindeks dalam format .json yang…
entry.content:
Kitab yang dapat diunduh di Aplikasi disimpan di server GitHub-Kitab Repo.

Data Kitab diunggah ke GitHub-Releases. Semua ID Kitab telah diindeks dalam format .json yang tersedia di repo.
